title: Our Commitment to a Better Future
description: Sustainability is not a separate initiative — it is embedded in everything we do. From the way we source to the way we process and trade, we are committed to building a food system that is good for people, planet, and profit.

focusAreas.title: Empowering Smallholder Farmers
focusAreas.description: We invest in training, inputs, and market access for smallholder farmers — helping them improve yields, increase incomes, and build resilient livelihoods.

focusAreas.title: Sustainable Sourcing & Practices
focusAreas.description: We source responsibly, promote regenerative farming practices, and work to reduce waste and emissions across our supply chain.

focusAreas.title: Rural Development & Livelihoods
focusAreas.description: We contribute to rural development by creating jobs, supporting local economies, and investing in community infrastructure.

focusAreas.title: Food Security & Nutrition
focusAreas.description: We play a direct role in improving food security by ensuring that quality, affordable food reaches those who need it most.

focusAreas.title: Environmental Stewardship
focusAreas.description: We are committed to reducing our environmental footprint — through water-efficient processing, renewable energy, and conservation-focused land management.

impactVision.title: Our Impact Vision
impactVision.description: By 2030, we aim to directly improve the livelihoods of over 1 million smallholder farming families, reduce our carbon footprint by 40%, and contribute meaningfully to food security across every market we operate in.
